title: Toggle Frost Walker
description: Toggle the effects of Frost Walker with a command or by sneaking 3 times
body:
# Toggle Frost Walker
Toggle the effects of Frost Walker by using a command or by sneaking 3 times.  
Requires a Paper 1.17 compatible server or newer.
## Commands
* `togglefrostwalker` (`tfw`)  
  Toggles the effects of Frost Walker
* `togglefrostwalkersneaktoggle` (`tfwst`)  
  Toggles the sneak toggle
